title: heliophila tricuspidata
intro: Heliophila tricuspidata, also known as the three-lobed heliophila or Cape marigold, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of heliophila tricuspidata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to utilize its medicinal properties.
